name: Mocha Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 C).
2. Grease an 8 by 8 inch baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour and baking soda. Mix well with a whisk and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, blend the dark brown sugar and white sugar with an electric mixer at medium speed until combined.
5. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste.
6. Melt baking chocolate in a double boiler.
7. Dissolve instant coffee in boiling water in a small bowl.
8. Add melted chocolate and dissolved coffee to the sugar and butter mixture. Beat at medium speed until smooth.
9. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and almond extract. Beat until smooth.
10. Scrape down the sides of the bowl and add the flour mixture and chocolate chips. Blend at low speed just until combined. Do not overmix.
11. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
12. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick placed in the center comes out clean.
13. Cool in the pan for 15 minutes, then invert onto a rack.
14. For the glaze, melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler and stir until smooth.
15. Spread the glaze over the brownies and sprinkle with almonds. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
